---
name: Security coordination request
about: Request private coordination for a suspected vulnerability
title: "Security coordination request"
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Do not include exploit details, secrets, full payload replay artifacts, or sensitive cluster data in this public issue.

Use this issue only to request private coordination if no private reporting channel is configured for your environment.

## Affected Area

- Handler sandbox
- Host imports
- Capability protocol
- Generated manifests/RBAC
- Replay artifacts/log redaction
- Supply chain/package release
- Other:

## Contact

Provide a safe way for maintainers to coordinate privately.
